meta.homeDescription: The Commonwealth School — preschool in Abidjan.

partnership.title: A shared vision
partnership.body: Commonwealth School combines excellence with the Finnish approach to early childhood education to build an innovative, forward-looking pedagogy.

values.title: Our values
values.intro: Commonwealth School draws on both international excellence and African cultural heritage. Its identity combines the fern’s message of resilience with a modern vision of holistic, human education. It celebrates diversity, the strength of community, and learning together—raising grounded, confident, and caring citizens.
values.courageBody: To dare, face challenges, and grow with confidence.
values.curiosityBody: To wonder, ask questions, and learn with joy.
values.collabBody: To move forward together with respect, sharing, and solidarity.
